pastables.name: Install brew package on apple silicon
Fix for: The requested image's platform (linux/amd64) does not match the detected host platform (linux/arm64/v8)
pastables.pastableText:
docker pull --platform linux/arm64/v8 [docker image name]

platform: linux/arm64/v8 to top of container in docker-compose.yml

pastables.name: Get all Taxonomies and Meta Data for a post type
Approved Dayworks Query
pastables.pastableText: kco = '210' and tip_type = 'TRADE' and pot_type IN ('H', 'W') and poh_chgno = '' and job_num = '128' and (poh_cisnotes = '' or poh_cisnotes IS NULL) and poh_appstat = 'COM'

pastables.name: TMUX Binds
pastables.pastableText:
tmux list-sessions or tmux ls -> show the current sessions
tmux attach -t [id or name] -> connect to a session
tmux rename-session -t [id or name] [name] -> rename a session
tmux new -s [name] -> creates a new tmux session with that name
tmux kill-session -t [id or name] -> kill a specific tmux session

tmux keyboard shortcuts cmd + d -> split window macOS (don’t bother)

when in tmux (all commands start with ctrl+b):
d -> detach from tmux
c -> new window
[index of window] -> go to that window
, -> rename window
x -> kill window (or just type exit)
shift + 5 -> split window vertical to right
shift + ' -> split window bottom
arrow keys -> switch pane


VIM keyboard shortcuts :w -> save file
:q -> quit vim

modes:
i -> insert mode
esc, ctrl+c -> exit mode to normal
v -> visual mode
shift + v -> visual line mode (adds new lines to copy and pasted lines)
a -> move forward and go insert mode

movement
j -> move cursor up
k -> move cursor down L -> move cursor right
h -> move cursor left
w -> move cursor over one word (faster than L)
b -> move cursor back one word (faster than h)
[offset]j -> move cursor up by [offset] lines
[offset]k -> move cursor down by [offset] lines
o -> swap to other end of selection in 

actions:
dd -> delete a line and puts it into clip board
u -> undo previous action
ctrl + r -> redo previous action
d[offset][direction] -> delete [offset] lines in [direction] (direction is j, k, l, h)
dw -> delete next word
db -> delete previous word
 in visual mode:
y -> copy
p -> paste

pastables.name: CLose customer care issues
pastables.pastableText:
SELECT * from [site_app].[issues] as isu
where (
isu.plot_id in (
select pl.plot_id from [site_app].[plots] as pl 
join [site_app].[developments] as dev on dev.development_id = pl.development_id
join [site_app].companies as comp on comp.company_id = dev.company_id
where 
(pl.number = '001' and dev.coins_code = '046' and comp.coins_code = '315') or
(pl.number = '072' and dev.coins_code = '046' and comp.coins_code = '315')
)
and isu.issue_ref in ('136411', '139320')
)

SELECT * from [site_app].issue_tasks as isut
WHERE (
isut.issue_id in (
SELECT issue_id from [site_app].[issues] as isu
where (
isu.plot_id in (
select pl.plot_id from [site_app].[plots] as pl 
join [site_app].[developments] as dev on dev.development_id = pl.development_id
join [site_app].companies as comp on comp.company_id = dev.company_id
where 
(pl.number = '001' and dev.coins_code = '046' and comp.coins_code = '315') or
(pl.number = '072' and dev.coins_code = '046' and comp.coins_code = '315')
)
and isu.issue_ref in ('136411', '139320')
)
)
)



UPDATE site_app.issues
set status = 3, closed = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATETIME2) 
where site_app.issues.issue_id in ('4520602', '4601208')

UPDATE site_app.issue_tasks 
set status = 3, completed = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATETIME2), completed_by = null
where site_app.issue_tasks.issue_tasks_id in ('5946148', '6026071')

pastables.name: Find Developments with usable Calloffs
pastables.pastableText:
SELECT DISTINCT
    po.kco,
    po.job_num,
    hb.vsi_name,
    hb.jtlastupdate
FROM coins.POOrder po
LEFT JOIN coins.HBDevelopment hb
    ON  hb.kco     = po.kco
    AND hb.job_num = po.job_num
WHERE
    -- PO has call-offs enabled
    NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(po.poh_alwcode, ''))), '') IS NOT NULL

    -- Supplier exists and is active in COINS
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM coins.APVendor v
        WHERE v.kco = po.kco AND v.cim_intref = po.cim_intref
    )

    -- At least one line on the current revision still has qty remaining to call off
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM coins.POOrderRevisionLine porl
        WHERE porl.kco       = po.kco
          AND porl.poh_ordno = po.poh_ordno
          AND porl.poh_chgno = po.poh_lastchgno
          AND (
              porl.pol_qty - ISNULL((
                  SELECT SUM(col.ocl_qty)
                  FROM coins.xPOcoline col
                  INNER JOIN coins.xPOCOHDR coh
                      ON  col.kco       = coh.kco
                      AND col.poh_ordno = coh.poh_ordno
                      AND col.och_cono  = coh.och_cono
                  WHERE col.kco       = porl.kco
                    AND col.poh_ordno = porl.poh_ordno
                    AND col.poi_item  = porl.poi_item
                    AND coh.och_confirm = 1
              ), 0)
          ) > 0.01
    )
ORDER BY hb.jtlastupdate DESC;

pastables.name: Add No-change uncommitted to all plots
pastables.pastableText:
INSERT INTO site_app.plot_build_stages_uncommitted (
    plot_id,
    build_stage_id,
    completed_date,
    is_committed,
    is_changed
)
SELECT
    p.plot_id,
    null,
    GETDATE(),
    0,
    0
FROM site_app.plots p
WHERE p.development_id = 7473;
